title: Indexed candidate-gene variant search
description: Read only assembly-pinned candidate intervals from the indexed annotated-VCF fixture, validate contig and available assembly metadata, deduplicate overlapping region results per selected gene and allele, and emit both variant and coverage rows. Live VEP annotation is a subsequent provider, not implied by this fixture binding.

resolvers.title: DuckHTS indexed VCF/BCF read
resolvers.description: Materialize raw VCF/BCF rows from an htslib region string.

resolvers.title: DuckDB SQL materialization
resolvers.description: Materialize an empty typed relation when no candidate interval is resolvable.

params.sql: SELECT NULL::VARCHAR AS CHROM, NULL::BIGINT AS POS, NULL::VARCHAR AS REF, NULL::VARCHAR[] AS ALT, NULL::VARCHAR[] AS INFO_GENE, NULL::VARCHAR[] AS INFO_CSQ, NULL::FLOAT[] AS INFO_AF, NULL::VARCHAR[] AS INFO_CLNSIG, NULL::VARCHAR[] AS INFO_ZYGOSITY, NULL::VARCHAR[] AS INFO_INHERITANCE WHERE FALSE

resources.title: Case VCF contigs and assembly metadata

params.sql: SELECT NULL::VARCHAR AS chrom, NULL::BIGINT AS length, NULL::VARCHAR AS assembly WHERE FALSE

operations.title: Search candidate gene intervals in the case VCF
operations.description: Return allele-level candidate rows with the fixture's declared INFO annotations plus one coverage row per hypothesis gene. Overlapping region duplicates are collapsed per selected gene and allele.
